projects.title: Probabilistic Adaptive Kalman Filter
projects.summary: Research project at KFUPM on sensor fusion and probabilistic guarantees under noise mis-specification.

projects.title: RL-based Control of Microgrid
projects.summary: Research on reinforcement learning-based control strategies for microgrid systems.

projects.title: Adaptive Control of Variable-Tilt Hexacopter
projects.summary: Geometric adaptive control on SE(3) for fully-actuated aerial vehicles with online parameter estimation.

projects.title: SE(3) Geometric Estimation and Control
projects.summary: Geometric approach to modelling, control allocation, and visual-inertial odometry for hexacopters.

projects.title: Model-based ARX Ship Identification
projects.summary: APO-optimized ARX-based system identification of ship maneuvering systems, later published in 2025.

projects.title: Grasp Planning for Underwater Robot Cooperation
projects.summary: Master's thesis research at Universitat Jaume I as part of the COOPERAMOS project on underwater robot cooperation.

projects.title: Autonomous Docking and Underwater Treasure Search
projects.summary: Vision-based autonomous systems for an underwater robotics competition with BlueROV.

projects.title: Trajectory Planning and Autonomous Control
projects.summary: Path planning and control algorithms for BlueROV autonomous underwater vehicles.

projects.title: Oceanographic Analysis of the Mediterranean Sea
projects.summary: Data-driven analysis and visualization of oceanographic data from the Mediterranean Sea.

projects.title: Modelling and Simulation of Autonomous Underwater Vehicle
projects.summary: System dynamics modelling and simulation of underwater robotic systems.

projects.title: Development of Unmanned Aerial System
projects.summary: Research and development of an aerial surveillance and delivery system with advanced control and robotics components.
